id.description: CAN arbitration ID. Standard IDs are ≤0x7FF; extended IDs are ≤0x1FFFFFFF.

ext.description: True for 29-bit extended ID format. Omitted from JSON when false.

rtr.description: Remote transmission request. Must be false when fd is true. Omitted from JSON when false.

fd.description: True for CAN-FD frames (supports up to 64 data bytes). Omitted from JSON when false.

brs.description: Bit-rate switch (CAN-FD only). Must be false when fd is false. Omitted from JSON when false.

data.description: Frame data bytes, base64-encoded. Max 8 bytes for classic CAN; max 64 bytes for CAN-FD.
